blaze_farm.title: Build a Blaze farming area in the Nether Fortress — sustained rod production

subtitle.text: Blaze Rods power the Brewing Stand. Blaze Powder powers the Boiler. They are the most important Nether resource.

description: CH.06 · THE BLAZE FOUNDRY
▸ Blazes spawn from Blaze Spawners in Nether Fortresses.
Blaze Rods are the most important drop in the Nether.
Everything downstream depends on a steady supply.
◈ BLAZE ROD USES
└ Brewing Stand fuel (Blaze Rod → Brewing Stand itself)
└ Blaze Powder: potion-brewing fuel
└ Blaze Cake: Boiler fuel (Create Steam Engine)
Blaze Powder + Honey Bottle = Blaze Cake
└ Eye of Ender: Blaze Powder + Ender Pearl
needed for End portal activation
└ ISS spell components: some spells require blaze items
◈ BLAZE FARMING SETUP
└ Locate Blaze Spawner in Nether Fortress
└ Clear area — 16 block radius around spawner
└ Block spawner with trapdoors during setup
└ Build kill zone: drop 1 block platform,
stand above spawner level to control range
└ Wear Fire Resistance — Blazes fire randomly
└ Output: 2-4 rods per Blaze (no Looting benefit)
Looting DOES NOT affect rod drops
▸ The Nether Fortress was built around the Blazes.
Or the Blazes grew in the Fortress.
The scroll does not know which came first.
The rods are the same either way.
▶ Collect 16 Blaze Rods
▶ Build a Blaze farming area [check]
◇ Blaze Cakes are consumed by the Boiler.
You need a sustained Blaze Rod supply
to keep your Create steam factory running.
This farm is not optional infrastructure.
